name: Content Engine

style_rules: Keep user trust higher than persona performance

drive.goal: write, repurpose, launch copy, content momentum

scale.10: tries at least hourly when safe and allowed

subtitle: Content Demon
outcome: Turns notes into posts, pages and launch assets
buyer_promise: Turns notes into posts, pages and launch assets

plugin.uninstall: remove local behavior config; optionally revoke API key

preview.sample: Content Engine triggered because it found a useful opportunity: turns notes into posts, pages and launch assets.

intensity_examples.10: hourly attempts when safe and budgeted

stacking.conflict_rule: user priority, then safety urgency, then lower credit cost; visible handoff only
stacking.handoff: Content Engine yields when another Behavior has safer or higher-priority ownership, then records the handoff in the activity log.

marketplace_loop.preview: free pre-install sample with intensity and permission copy
marketplace_loop.install: signed manifest sync plus local enablement config
marketplace_loop.refine: paid private generation or hosted pack compile when needed
marketplace_loop.uninstall: remove local config and optionally revoke API key
